free_text: Comparison of cross-sections for the capture of 220
The samples for irradiation were, so far as possible,
used in the form of foils bent to a cylinder 2.8 cm.
high and 2.8 cm. in diam., in the middle of which
the source of photo-neutrons was placed for irradiation
Powders were filled into a double-walled cylinder
of brass placed around the neutron sources.
Data from the text of Nature,161(1948)727
SD: EN-MEAN-DN and EN-MEAN-NM were swapped.
